ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last modified */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "implementation_language" TEXT /* Implementation language of the algorithm */,
  "complexity_analysis" TEXT /* Complexity analysis of the algorithm (e.g., O(n), O(n log n)) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being benchmarked */,
  "input_size" INTEGER /* Number of inputs used for the benchmark */,
  "average_runtime" REAL /* Average runtime of the algorithm */,
  "worst_case_runtime" REAL /* Worst-case runtime of the algorithm */,
  "ref_8_scaled" REAL /* Benchmark reference [8] scaled value */,
  "ref_10_scaled" REAL /* Benchmark reference [10] scaled value */,
  "size_of_f" INTEGER /* Size of the input data (f) */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage of the algorithm */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* CPU utilization of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark version */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the benchmark */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_versions_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new benchmark, updated algorithm) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
